label: Philippines VFA/SOVFA Partners
deltaNote: US (1951), Australia (2023), France (March 26, 2026 — first European SOVFA). Japan RAA entered into force September 2025.

label: AUKUS Submarine Program Cost
contestNote: Lifetime program cost; near-term (10yr) estimate is AUD $53–63B. US approved $1B FMS to UK for SSN-AUKUS systems, March 2026.

label: Filipino Fishers Displaced
contestNote: Pamalakaya estimate; ODI study found 17,000 marine jobs lost mid-2021 to mid-2022

label: SCS Proved/Probable Oil Reserves
contestNote: China estimates up to 293–344 billion barrels; most commercial reserves are in uncontested waters

label: China Defense Budget 2024 (Official)
contestNote: Pentagon estimates true figure at $330–450B; MIT researchers estimate $474B (PPP-adjusted)

label: Balikatan 2026 — Largest in History
deltaNote: Commenced April 20 at Camp Aguinaldo. 7 nations (PH, US, Australia, Japan, Canada, France, NZ) + 18 observers. Japan deploys 1,400 troops with Type 88 anti-ship missiles for first SINKEX (BRP Quezon). Japan Defense Minister Koizumi observing. China warned 'playing with fire.'

label: China's Artificial Island Reclamation
deltaNote: Created 2013–2016; all three major Spratly bases now militarized with SAMs and ASCMs

label: BRP Sierra Madre Marine Garrison
deltaNote: Aboard WWII-era vessel grounded at Second Thomas Shoal since 1999; hull in critical condition

label: China Maritime Militia Vessels (Spratlys)
contestNote: China denies maritime militia designation, calling vessels ordinary fishing boats

label: Philippines Annual Reef Ecosystem Loss
contestNote: Estimate; actual figure depends on reef extent and valuation methodology
